introSection: Wild Chipmunk is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Lakeside Amusement Park in Denver, Colorado, USA. It was opened in 1955 by Miler Manufacturing.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 4 cars. Riders are arranged inline in 2 rows for a total of 2 riders per car.

fullText:
Wild Chipmunk is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Lakeside Amusement Park in Denver, Colorado, USA. It was opened in 1955 by Miler Manufacturing.



4 cars. Riders are arranged inline in 2 rows for a total of 2 riders per car.
